notes: Subject-position 'dia' → singular 'they' (gender-unspecified default). VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: in real conversation, do you and partner typically already know which person 'dia' refers to (so 'he'/'she' might be more natural after disambiguation)? The conservative singular-they default avoids gendering when context isn't established. Follow-up: a future story may add a 'pinned gender' setting per partner contact when the speaker explicitly tells the app the referent's pronouns.
